{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spear of Tharlos
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Spear of Tharlos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Spear]] of [[Tharlos]] is an ancient, legendary artifact crafted during the [[Elder]] Days by one of [[the Emperor]]'s companions. Carved from the remains of [[Tharlos]], a member of the Formless [[Legion]], the weapon is composed of yellowed bone and features a straight shaft that terminates in a sharpened, spade-like blade. Despite its physical appearance as a six-foot-tall spear, the object possesses unique spatial properties that allow it to be compressed into a small size, such as a thighbone or a dagger, and stored within a coat pocket. The weapon is characterized by its sentient and chaotic nature. It possesses a powerful, heavy [[Intent]] that seeks constant transformation and change, often manifesting as a desire to reshape the world into surreal or organic forms. This consciousness allows the spear to act independently, such as twisting in mid-air to change its trajectory, shifting into different shapes like a muskrat or a turtle, or even attempting to escape its owner. It also exerts a psychological influence on those nearby, projecting an [[aura]] of heavy [[Intent]] that can urge individuals to undergo transformation or instill a sense of profound dread. The spear is currently soulbound to [[Bliss]], the Head of the [[Blackwatch]]. This bond grants her significant combat advantages, including enhanced strength and speed, as well as the ability to use the weapon's transformative powers to alter physical objects or projectiles. However, the connection is reciprocal; the spear's restless energy can influence [[Bliss]]'s temperament, making her more unpredictable and prone to irritation. To maintain control, [[Bliss]] must occasionally feed the weapon to satisfy its hunger and keep it calm.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] is an item belonging to [[Bliss]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] was carved from the corpse of [[Tharlos, the Formless Legion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] is made of ancient yellowed bone.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] can twist of its own accord, bending physical mass.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Tharlos]]' spear was contorting and writhing in the pocket of [[Bliss]]'s coat.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Bliss]]'s [[Spear of Tharlos]] was thrown during a clash between [[Teach]] and [[Jerri]] in [[the Emperor]]'s chambers.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] can be sensed through mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] is an ancient [[Elder]] artifact that can transform things thrown at it.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] is an [[Elder]] weapon.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Crafted by the [[Regents]] from a bone harvested from the [[Great Elder]] of Chaos, the [[Spear]] of [[Tharlos]] possesses unsettlingly lifelike qualities, including a rhythmic throbbing similar to a heartbeat. The artifact later manifests its presence by being held against [[Calder]]'s throat upon his awakening. Driven by a constant desire for change, the [[Spear]]'s intent is managed by [[Bliss]], who utilizes an [[Intent]]-sealing harness to restrain it. Despite its volatile nature, the weapon holds the ability to neutralize lethal poisons and has even undergone a transformation into a muskrat.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] was made by the [[Regents]] from a bone taken from the [[Great Elder]] of Chaos.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] exhibits [[life]]-like qualities such as throbbing like a heart.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] is at [[Calder]]'s throat when he wakes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Spear of Tharlos]]' [[Intent]] wants things to change constantly.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] keeps the [[Spear of Tharlos]] in an [[Intent]]-sealing harness.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] can neutralize lethal poison.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Spear of Tharlos]] turned into a muskrat.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bliss of the Blackwatch]] has a [[Spear of Tharlos]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
